sanskrit:
यदा यदा हि धर्मस्य ग्लानिर्भवति भारत।
अभ्युत्थानमधर्मस्य तदात्मानं सृजाम्यहम्॥
transliteration: yadā yadā hi dharmasya glānir bhavati bhārata | abhyutthānam adharmasya tadātmānaṃ sṛjāmy aham ||
literal_meaning: Whenever/wherever there is a decline of dharma, O Bhārata, and a rise of adharma, then I manifest Myself.
contextual_meaning: The psyche self-regulates: when core values (dharma) are eclipsed by shadow impulses (adharma), an inner archetypal presence (avatāra) spontaneously activates to restore balance.
psychological_state: Moral exhaustion giving way to expectancy of inner rescue; shift from ego-centric to Self-centric locus of control.
trigger_scenario: You realize your team’s toxic culture is rewarded while integrity gets punished; suddenly a values-aligned leader appears or you feel compelled to become one.
anchor_text: When values collapse, an inner guide awakens to restore balance.
